# minio_server_config_heal (Resource)

Manages MinIO object healing configuration. Controls background bitrot scanning and data repair settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "minio_server_config_heal" "main" {
  bitrotscan = "on"
  max_sleep  = "250ms"
  max_io     = "100"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `bitrotscan` (String) Bitrot scan mode: "on", "off", or cycle duration (e.g., "12m" for monthly).
- `drive_workers` (String) Number of workers per drive for healing. Empty for auto (1/4 CPU cores).
- `max_io` (String) Maximum concurrent I/O operations for healing.
- `max_sleep` (String) Maximum sleep between heal operations (e.g., "250ms").

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The heal configuration identifier
- `restart_required` (Boolean) Whether a MinIO server restart is required.

## Import

```shell
terraform import minio_server_config_heal.example example-id
```
